documentation.readme: gitGraber is a tool developed in Python3 to monitor GitHub to search and find sensitive data in real time for different online services such as: Google, Amazon (AWS), Paypal, Github, Mailgun, Facebook, Twitter, Heroku, Stripe, Twilio...
usage_sections: Add your own Github tokens (Personal access tokens) : `GITHUBTOKENS = ['yourToken1Here','yourToken2Here']`

chain_examples.note: Shares attack_surface+phase_hint+tag with zynon/LdapRelayScan (score=9); pair in the chain planner.
Shares attack_surface+phase_hint+tag with zodiacon/HookHunter (score=9); pair in the chain planner.
Shares attack_surface+phase_hint+tag with zmap/zmap (score=9); pair in the chain planner.
Phase 3: same attack_surface=['web'] and phase_hint='any'; this entry chains with adjacent tools in the same family. The full set of siblings is enumerated by the catalog search index.
Phase 4: same attack_surface=['web'] and phase_hint='any'; this entry chains with adjacent tools in the same family. The full set of siblings is enumerated by the catalog search index.
Phase 5: same attack_surface=['web'] and phase_hint='any'; this entry chains with adjacent tools in the same family. The full set of siblings is enumerated by the catalog search index.

documentation.when_to_use: Use during the 'any' phase against surfaces [web] in the osint category. Fits when the engagement needs: gitGraber is a tool developed in Python3 to monitor GitHub to search and find sensitive data in real time for different online services such as: Google, Amazon (AWS), Paypal, Github, Mailgun, Facebook, Twitter, Heroku, S.
documentation.why_to_use: Prefer this tool based on upstream description: gitGraber is a tool developed in Python3 to monitor GitHub to search and find sensitive data in real time for different online services such as: Google, Amazon (AWS), Paypal, Github, Mailgun, Facebook, Twitter, Heroku, Stripe, Twilio.
documentation.how_to_use: Run the primary entrypoint as shown in upstream docs, e.g. `usage: gitGraber.py [-h] [-k KEYWORDSFILE] [-q QUERY] [-s] [-w WORDLIST]`. Further invocations from upstream: `python3 gitGraber.py -k keywordsfile.txt -q YOURWORD -s`; `python3 gitGraber.py -k keywordsfile.txt -q \"yahoo.com\" -s`. gitGraber is a tool developed in Python3 to monitor GitHub to search and find sensitive data in real time for different online services such as: Google, Amazon (AWS), Paypal, Github, Mailgun, Facebook, Twitter, Heroku, Stripe, Twilio.

trust.warning: Attribution / index entry only. The operator must audit the code, the README, the license, and the releases before invoking. Phase 5 — entry is auto-generated from the operator's curated fetch list; no automated enrichment yet.
